name: Press D to Die
short_description: The path to victory has to be paved with corpses, but who said they can't be your own? In this quick to finish puzzle-platformer, they can be!
detailed_description:
Press D to die

Die with just the simple press of a button! Unlike in real life, suicide will actually help you by leaving behind a corpse. A corpse can be interacted with using other abilities in various combinations in order to reach previously unreachable places.

Solve problems in your own way

With a few exceptions, any challenge in which you can place corpses could be solved in a ways which we as developers didn't think to be possible.
This is because of the the abilities the Player Character has and especially how these interact with corpses
"what are these abilities?" (a question you definitely just asked yourself) - well, that's for us to know and for you to find out!

3 distinct Levels

With a total first time playtime of about 45min to 1:30h (depending on familiarity with 2d platformers), each of the 3 levels has distinct themes of gameplay, visual aesthetic and original music.

We are aware of the games comparably short length, but we can confidently say: If you're looking for a short and unique platformer experience, Press D to Die is for you!
